items.title: Kalyani Pramod’s upcoming Chennai exhibition turns waste into art inspired by endangered species
items.summary: From the great Indian bustard to the yellow-breasted bunting, Kalyani Pramod’s recycled fibre artworks spotlight endangered wildlife at Alliance Française of Madras from July 18

items.title: Judge a purchase by its cover: how three sustainable outlets in Chennai make sure packaging does not leave carbon footprints
items.summary: Restore at Kottivakkam on East Coast Road offers a 2 per cent discount on purchases if the customer brings their own bag; Kazhani Native Farms, also at Kottivakkam, has placed a cardboard box at the entrance inviting customers to drop off extra shopping bags for others to reuse; and Tula India in Adyar encourages customers to bring their own bags, and those who forget are handed handmade newspaper bags

items.title: A ‘green’ carpet rolled out to nature enthusiasts
items.summary: Bushwalk corridor, a community-built green space along the Buckingham Canal behind House of Hiranandani Upscale in Egattur on Old Mahabalipuram Road serves as a venue for guided bushwalks and birding sessions, as it did on World Environment Day

items.title: Oncology Kitchen at ICH takes a worry off the plate for parents of children receiving  cancer treatment
items.summary: Oncology Kitchen at the government-run Institute of Child Health and Hospital for Children in Egmore meets the huge nutritional needs of children undergoing cancer treatment. And the fact that the bill of fare comes free is a huge relief to their parents

items.title: Central Information Commission directs IIT-M to disclose utilisation of grant-in-aid funds
items.summary: It gave the direction on a petition filed by Ananya Dubey, who sought details of the grant-in-aid received by the institute in the previous three financial years, along with project-wise utilisation of the funds, copies of utilisation certificates, and the names of collaborations

items.title: Ban cow slaughter in Tamil Nadu with immediate effect, orders Madras High Court
items.summary: Judges say, goats and sheep too should not be allowed to be slaughtered in any place other than a licensed slaughter house

items.title: Tiruchi residents among those killed in Vietnam boat accident

items.title: S. Janaki excelled in Carnatic-based film songs
items.summary: Her devotion to music extended beyond cinema, although she often said she never enjoyed the rigours of formal classical training

items.title: Villagers oppose establishment of sewage treatment plant near Arcot
items.summary: Residents of Pindithangal village in Ranipet district have been up against the establishment of a sewage treatment plant by the neighbouring Kalavai town panchayat in their village. They are worried that the groundwater table will be contaminated in Pindithangal and the nearby farming villages, where farmers depend on borewells and waterbodies for irrigation

items.title: Schoolchildren hit street protesting against Tasmac outlet near Jayankondam
Tamil Nadu drew lower quantity of rice than its share under Antyodaya Anna Yojana in five of last seven years
items.summary: From 2019-20 to 2025-26, it was during the COVID-19 pandemic year (2020-21) that the drawal was almost close to the allocated figure of around 6.99 lakh tonnes, with the off-take being about 98%. In the remaining four years, it varied from around 73% during 2022-23 and 2023-24 to 79% during 2024-25

items.title: Nendran banana growers face shortage of water for irrigation
items.summary: With water not released from Mettur dam and continued dry spell, farmers are worried about the survival of the nendran banana crops in the next month or two months

Experts call for wider access to incision-free Parkinson’s treatment

items.title: I am neither running away nor hiding: DMK leader E.V. Velu
items.summary: Displaying his medical records, Mr. Velu said he had been receiving treatment for heart ailments at Mount Elizabeth Hospital in Singapore since 2016. After election campaign, he had planned to undergo medical check-up there, stated the DMK whip in the Assembly.
